name: Potato, Leek and Cod Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice 4 large leeks (white parts only).
2. Soak salt cod overnight, changing water at least once.
3. Drain the salt cod and place it in a pan with milk. Cook over medium heat for 8 minutes.
4. Remove the salt cod from the pan and strain the milk into a bowl.
5. Flake and discard any skin or bones from the salt cod.
6. Melt butter in a clean saucepan over low heat.
7. Add the leeks and cook, stirring occasionally, until soft (about 5 minutes).
8. Stir in flour, then stir in the reserved milk, potatoes, and ground white pepper.
9. Increase the heat to medium and cover. Cook for 15 minutes.
10. Add the flaked salt cod and remove from heat.
This soup may be made up to one day in advance to this point. Cool, cover, and refrigerate.
1. Thinly stir sour cream into hot soup just before serving.
2. Pour the mixture over the soup in a tureen, sprinkle with fresh dill, and serve.
